name: grep
description: Search for a pattern in file contents. Supports regex. Returns matching file paths by default (files_with_matches), matching lines (content), or match counts (count).

path.description: Directory or file to search in (default: current directory)

output_mode.description: Output mode: 'files_with_matches' (default, file paths only), 'content' (matching lines), 'count' (match counts per file)

context.description: Lines of context around each match. Only applies to output_mode=content (default: 0)

multiline.description: Enable multiline matching where . matches newlines (default: false)
